'''âp-g-f-y''' ('''kapagfeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centuplicate|centuplicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centuplicate|centuplicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-f-y
|-
! Lemma
| kapagfeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagfeyoko|thipagfeyoko]] || [[word:jipagfeyoko|jipagfeyoko]] || [[word:shipagfeyoko|shipagfeyoko]] || [[word:kipagfeyoko|kipagfeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupagfeyoko|thuthupagfeyoko]] || [[word:jujupagfeyoko|jujupagfeyoko]] || [[word:shushupagfeyoko|shushupagfeyoko]] || [[word:kukupagfeyoko|kukupagfeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopagfeyoko|thopagfeyoko]] || [[word:jopagfeyoko|jopagfeyoko]] || [[word:shopagfeyoko|shopagfeyoko]] || [[word:kopagfeyoko|kopagfeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpagfeyoko|thĂŠpagfeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpagfeyoko|jĂŠpagfeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpagfeyoko|shĂŠpagfeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpagfeyoko|kĂŠpagfeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapagfeyoko|thapagfeyoko]] || [[word:japagfeyoko|japagfeyoko]] || [[word:shapagfeyoko|shapagfeyoko]] || [[word:kapagfeyoko|kapagfeyoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
